title: Using iA Writer with Obsidian
first_prompt: Can I use ia writer with obsidian?
summary: Irwin was trying to determine the technical feasibility of integrating iA Writer, a distraction-free editor, with Obsidian, a local markdown vault for his book project. The conversation quickly narrowed to the functionality of wiki links, and after the assistant initially suggested that iA Writer lacked native support for Obsidian's specific `[[wiki links]]` syntax, Irwin corrected the record, confirming that the editor does indeed support this crucial linking feature.
